mapper.insert: INSERT INTO swiss_kit_setting_email (email, password, smtp_address, smtp_port, need_tls, need_ssl, from_address) VALUES (#{email}, #{password}, #{smtpAddress}, #{smtpPort}, #{needTLS}, #{needSSL}, #{fromAddress})
mapper.select: SELECT id, email, password, smtp_address AS smtpAddress, smtp_port AS smtpPort, need_tls AS needTLS, need_ssl AS needSSL, from_address AS fromAddress FROM swiss_kit_setting_email ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
